caption: The two cavalry (top) spawn facing north, then the enemy AI's auto-advance snaps them to face south toward the player infantry almost immediately -- a ~167 degree flip in one tick, the exact repro from #631. Before this fix that flip swapped every soldier's formation slot to the opposite side of the block, so the whole cavalry formation visibly compressed then re-expanded over ~1.5-3 seconds while everyone walked to their new side ("pulsing"). Watch the two cavalry blocks stay a steady size through the flip instead of shrinking and regrowing.
